basic_details.job_title: NEIAH Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 21 Professor, Radiologist and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: North Eastern Institute of Ayurveda and Homoeopathy (NEIAH)
basic_details.post_name: Professor, Associate Professor and Medical Specialists (Ayurveda & Homoeopathy)
basic_details.job_type: Deputation failing which by Direct Recruitment
basic_details.short_information: North Eastern Institute of Ayurveda and Homoeopathy (NEIAH) Professor, Associate Professor and Medical Specialists (Ayurveda & Homoeopathy) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://www.neiah.nic.in. A total of 21 vacancies have been announced through the NEIAH Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 55 years for all posts. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India rules for SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PWD and serving government employees.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree in Ayurveda/Homoeopathy/Medical subject, Teaching/Research experience as per post requirement, Valid NTET/Teacher Code, Minimum research publications
qualification.details: Professor (Ayurveda): Post Graduate Degree in Ayurveda in the concerned subject recognized under IMCC Act, 1970 (NCISM Act, 2020). Thirteen (13) years combined experience in teaching as Reader/Associate Professor and Assistant Professor/Lecturer in the concerned subject out of which minimum two years of experience in the Level-12 + NPA or Thirteen (13) years combined Research Experience in equivalent post of Associate Professor, Assistant Professor / Lecturer out of which Two years experience in Level-12 +NPA. Minimum five research publications indexed in index medicus or National Journals. Valid NTET certificate or teacher's code as per the guideline issued by NCISM. Desirable: PhD in Ayurveda. Associate Professor (Ayurveda): Post Graduate Degree in Ayurveda in the concerned subject recognized under IMCC Act, 1970 (NCISM Act, 2020). Nine (9) years of combined experience in teaching in the Concerned subject as Assistant Professor/ Lecturer out of which three (3) years experience in Level-11+NPA or Nine (9) years combined Research Experience in equivalent post of Assistant Professor/ Lecturer out of which three (3) years experience in Level-11 +NPA. Minimum three research publications indexed in index medicus or National Journals. Valid NTET certificate or teacher's code as per the guideline issued by NCISM. Desirable: PhD in Ayurveda. Professor (Homoeopathy): Post Graduate Degree in Homeopathy in the concerned subject included in the second schedule of Homoeopathy Central Council Act, 1973 (NCH Act 2020). Thirteen (13) years combined experience in teaching as Reader/Associate Professor and Assistant Professor/Lecturer in the concerned subject out of which minimum two years of experience in the Level-12 + NPA or Thirteen (13) years combined Research Experience in equivalent post of Associate Professor, Assistant Professor / Lecturer out of which Two years experience in Level-12 +NPA. Minimum five research publications indexed in index medicus or National Journals. Valid NTET certificate or teacher's code as per the guideline issued by NCH. Desirable: PhD in Homoeopathy. Associate Professor (Homoeopathy): Post Graduate Degree in Homoeopathy in the concerned subject included in the Second Schedule of Homoeopathy Central Council Act, 1973 (NCH Act 2020). Nine (9) years of combined experience in teaching in the Concerned subject as Assistant Professor/ Lecturer out of which three (3) years experience in Level-11 +NPA or Nine (9) years combined Research Experience in equivalent post of Assistant Professor/ Lecturer out of which three (3) years experience in Level-11 + NPA. Minimum three research publications indexed in index medicus or National Journals. Valid NTET certificate or teacher's code as per the guideline issued by NCH. Desirable: PhD in Homoeopathy. Professor (Homoeopathy Allied Subject): Post Graduate Degree in Homeopathy subject included in the 2nd schedule of Homoeopathy Central Council Act, 1973 (NCH Act 2020) or Post graduate Medical Degree in the concerned subject recognized by the India Medical Council Act, 1956 (NMC Act 2019). Thirteen (13) years combined experience in teaching as Reader/Associate Professor and Assistant Professor/Lecturer in the concerned subject out of which minimum two years of experience in the Level-12 + NPA or Thirteen (13) years combined Research Experience in equivalent post of Associate Professor, Assistant Professor / Lecturer out of which Two years experience in Level-12 + NPA. Minimum five research publications indexed in index medicus or National Journals. Valid NTET certificate or teacher's code. Desirable: PhD. Associate Professor (Homoeopathy Allied Subject): Post Graduate Degree in Homoeopathy subject included in the 2nd schedule of Homoeopathy Central Council Act, 1973 (NCH Act 2020) or Post graduate Medical Degree in the concerned subject recognized by the India Medical Council Act, 1956 (NMC Act 2019). Nine (9) years of combined experience in teaching as Assistant Professor/ Lecturer in the concerned subject out of which three (3) years experience in Level-11 + NPA or Nine (9) years combined Research Experience in equivalent post of Assistant Professor/ Lecturer out of which three (3) years experience in Level-11 + NPA. Minimum three research publications indexed in index medicus or National Journals. Valid NTET certificate or teacher's code. Desirable: Ph.D Obstetrician & Gynecologist: Post Graduate Degree in the concerned subject recognized under IMCC Act. Registered with MCI or State Council in a Hospital/ Institute of repute. 7 years experience in the relevant subject after acquiring post Graduate Degree. Surgical Specialist: Post Graduate Degree in the concerned subject recognized under IMCC Act, 1970. Registered with MCI or State Council in a Hospital/ Institute of repute. 7 years experience in the relevant subject after acquiring post Graduate Degree. Pediatrician: Post Graduate Degree in the concerned subject recognized under IMC Act. Registered with MCI or State Council in a Hospital/ Institute of repute. 7 years experience in the relevant subject after acquiring post Graduate Degree. Radiologist: Post Graduate Degree in the concerned subject recognized under IMC Act. Two (2) years experience in the related field after acquiring post Graduate degree.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NEIAH Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.neiah.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NEIAH Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NEIAH Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download NEIAH Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NEIAH Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria

content_sections.heading: NEIAH Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 55 years for all posts. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India rules for SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PWD and serving government employees.

rows.event: Last Date of Receipt of Application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NEIAH Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.neiah.nic.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NEIAH Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for NEIAH Recruitment 2026 is 17 August 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in NEIAH Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 21 vacancies for the posts of Professor, Associate Professor, and Medical Specialists (Ayurveda & Homoeopathy) in the North Eastern Institute of Ayurveda and Homoeopathy.

faq.question: Q3. What is the mode of application for NEIAH Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for NEIAH Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts is 55 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India rules for eligible categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required for the Professor posts?
faq.answer: For Professor posts, candidates need a Post Graduate Degree in the concerned subject (Ayurveda/Homoeopathy/Medical) with significant teaching/research experience and minimum research publications as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for NEIAH Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 1400/- for General/OBC candidates and Rs. 700/- for SC/ST candidates. There is no application fee for PwBD candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Professor and Associate Professor posts?
faq.answer: The salary for Professor posts ranges from Rs. 1,23,100 to Rs. 2,15,900 per month plus NPA, while for Associate Professor posts, it ranges from Rs. 78,800 to Rs. 2,09,200 per month plus NPA, depending on the specific post and pay matrix level.

faq.question: Q8. What are the selection criteria for NEIAH Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for NEIAH Recruitment 2026 will involve shortlisting of applications followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of NEIAH, which is www.neiah.nic.in. The direct link is also provided in the Important Links section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type is Deputation failing which by Direct Recruitment. This means the posts will first be offered on deputation, and if suitable candidates are not found, they will be filled through direct recruitment.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for NEIAH Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for NEIAH Recruitment 2026 is 17 August 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.
